2603.19451.title: LoFi: Location-Aware Fine-Grained Representation Learning for Chest X-ray
2603.19451.paper_summary: Fine-grained representation learning is crucial for retrieval and phrase grounding in chest X-rays, where clinically relevant findings are often spatially confined. However, the lack of region-level supervision in contrastive models and the limited ability of large vision language models to capture fine-grained representations in external validation lead to suboptimal performance on these tasks. To address these limitations, we propose Location-aware Fine-grained representation learning (LoFi), which jointly optimizes sigmoid, captioning, and location-aware captioning losses using a lightweight large language model. The location-aware captioning loss enables region-level supervision through grounding and dense captioning objectives, thereby facilitating fine-grained representation learning. Building upon these representations, we integrate a fine-grained encoder into retrieval-based in-context learning to enhance chest X-ray grounding across diverse settings. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our method achieves superior retrieval and phrase grounding performance on MIMIC-CXR and PadChest-GR.
2603.19451.paper_summary_zh: 細粒度表示學習對於胸部 X 光片中的檢索和短語定位至關重要，因為臨床相關的發現通常是空間上受限的。然而，對比模型中缺乏區域級監督，以及大型視覺語言模型在外部驗證中捕捉細粒度表示的能力有限，導致這些任務的性能不佳。為了解決這些限制，我們提出了位置感知細粒度表示學習（LoFi），該方法使用輕量級的大型語言模型共同優化 sigmoid、標題生成和位置感知標題生成損失。位置感知標題生成損失通過定位和密集標題生成目標實現區域級監督，從而促進細粒度表示學習。在這些表示的基礎上，我們將細粒度編碼器整合到基於檢索的上下文學習中，以增強在多樣化環境中的胸部 X 光片定位。廣泛的實驗表明，我們的方法在 MIMIC-CXR 和 PadChest-GR 上實現了優越的檢索和短語定位性能。
2603.19451.author: Myeongkyun Kang et.al.
2603.19451.authors: Myeongkyun Kang, Yanting Yang, Xiaoxiao Li
